channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY 🪚 Building my own container house ⚒️ Owner Builder Learning as I go 💪

item.title: I’m fabricating my own built out wardrobe and dumbwaiter to sa...
item.description:
I’m fabricating my own built out wardrobe and dumbwaiter to save space inside my container house! 🤌 As usual this became a tricker job than I had first assumed especially in summer but each step had me jumping up and down in excited so it wasn’t hard to stay motivated! They aren’t done yet but they are close to first stage completion all I need to do is finish the structure on the dumbwaiter and supports on both and then sheet them! 🤩 The internal work on them will get done when I do my internal walls 😍
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
